lecturers.name: Justin Wong
lecturers.title: iOS Lecturer
lecturers.description: Hello World! I'm a fourth year EECS & HUGEEE 🍎 Fanboy. I love to build iOS apps, delve into geopolitics, and get caffeinated on ☕️ in my free time. Feel free to contact me, and let's geek out together!

lecturers.name: Abby Li
lecturers.title: iOS Lecturer
lecturers.description: Hello! I’m a third-year EECS major. I enjoy playing badminton, building projects, and collecting niche tech — especially anything Apple 🍏. Also a huge fan of my 🌭 dogs!

lecturers.name: Mei Cibulka
lecturers.title: Web Lecturer
lecturers.description: HI! I'm Mei, a senior CS major here :) I like to read 📚🤓, find critters 🐿️, drink fruit tea 🧋, and I LOVE apples 🍎 (REAL apples not Apple ⬅️) HMU about anything I love to chat...

lecturers.name: Ethan Tam
lecturers.title: Web Lecturer
lecturers.description: Hey Everyone! I'm Ethan, an upcoming Senior from Chicago studying Computer Science and Film. When I'm not teaching, I love listening to Olivia Rodrigo and playing Smash.

lecturers.name: Mauricio Yeverino
lecturers.title: Web Lecturer
lecturers.description: Hi guys Im a senior CS major. From Mexico 🇲🇽. Love dogs and cats. Instagram reels. Mbappe. Feel free to reach out!!!

lecturers.name: Jessica Chiu
lecturers.title: Web Lecturer
lecturers.description: Hey everyone!! I'm a freshman applied math major. I love thrifting and altering clothes 🪡 I also love music, especially punk, gothic rock, and edm 🎵 Reach out if you ever need anything!
